expectations.evidence: opencollection.yml exists with info.name, info.version, info.type: collection, settings, and runtime.scripts sections
1-happy-path/folder.yml before-request script uses crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret) with bru.getProcessEnv('WEBHOOK_SECRET') and sets X-Webhook-Signature header
2.1-missing-signature.yml asserts expect(res.status).to.equal(401) with no X-Webhook-Signature header set (auth-errors folder has no signing script)
2.2-invalid-signature.yml sends hardcoded invalid header value 'deadbeef...' and asserts expect(res.status).to.equal(401)
3.1-invalid-json.yml sends '{not valid json at all' as body and asserts expect(res.status).to.equal(400)
4.2-duplicate-delivery.yml sends same event ID 'evt_dedup_001' (first sent in 4.1) and asserts expect(res.status).to.equal(409)
All HMAC scripts use bru.getProcessEnv('WEBHOOK_SECRET') — no hardcoded secret values. Environment file local.yml references process.env.WEBHOOK_SECRET
